title: coprosma nertera
intro: Coprosma nertera, also known as the mirror plant or reflective plant, is a unique and attractive flowering shrub native to New Zealand. It has been used in traditional Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat skin conditions, wounds, and infections due to its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Coprosma nertera include its potential to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Coprosma nertera can be made from its leaves, which can be infused in hot water or used in a salve to harness its medicinal properties.
